---
title: "project 1"
author: "Andrew Tran, Shreya Dubey, Joseph Bannon"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Project 1: Report

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
my_data <- read.csv("diamonds4.csv")
```

## Section 1


## Section 2


## Section 3
